title: AIWG Model Configuration
description: Default model mappings for AIWG SDLC framework deployment. Users can customize these values for their specific needs.

reasoning.description: Claude Opus 4.6 - Best for complex reasoning, architecture design, strategic decisions

coding.description: Claude Sonnet 4.6 - Best for code generation, implementation, debugging

efficiency.description: Claude Haiku 4.5 - Best for quick tasks, file operations, simple edits

reasoning.description: Factory AI uses bare Claude model identifiers (no anthropic/ prefix)

coding.description: Factory AI uses bare Claude model identifiers (no anthropic/ prefix)

efficiency.description: Factory AI uses bare Claude model identifiers (no anthropic/ prefix)

reasoning.description: GPT-5.4 - Newest flagship, priority 0 in Codex CLI model catalog (Mar 2026)

coding.description: GPT-5.3-Codex - Proven flagship coding model, priority 0 (Feb 2026)

efficiency.description: GPT-5.1-Codex-Mini - Listed budget model, free-tier compatible (priority 12)

reasoning.description: Windsurf uses Claude models via API (experimental)

coding.description: Windsurf uses Claude models via API (experimental)

efficiency.description: Windsurf uses Claude models via API (experimental)

ollama._note: Local model defaults via Ollama. These are reasonable starting points — tune to your hardware.

reasoning.description: Llama 3.3 70B — closest to cloud reasoning quality locally, requires 48GB+ VRAM

coding.description: Qwen 2.5 Coder 14B — best coding quality per VRAM of validated local models (12GB VRAM)

efficiency.description: Qwen 3.5 9B — consumer hardware entry point with tool use and vision support (8GB VRAM)

_comments.usage: This file defines default model mappings used by AIWG deployment scripts
_comments.customization: Users can modify these values to use different models or versions
_comments.location: Place custom models.json in project root to override defaults
